{{Quote|This Wookiee got out of hand and '''had''' to be put down.|Dehno to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Dehno''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] patrol [[Captain/Legends|captain]] who worked for the [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Corporation]] branch on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].

==Biography==
Dehno was a ruthless man, who would [[Death/Legends|kill]] (or in his terminology, "put down") any [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] that became rebellious.

He eventually encountered [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] who persuaded him not to [[Slavery/Legends|enslave]] any more Wookiees and to request a transfer.

==Behind the scenes==
If the player fails to persuade otherwise then the player may have to kill him. They will still get [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light side]] points, but not as much.

If the player entices [[Zaalbar]] to attack them, then he may earn [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] points.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
